evidence_summary: The scene must visually juxtapose the massive scale of the Thark expeditionary march with the intimate, internal isolation of John Carter. The movement of the column serves as a backdrop to his psychological struggle regarding the cultural rift and Dejah Th...

As the expeditionary force begins its march toward Thark, John Carter reflects on his deep love for Dejah Thoris and the agonizing misunderstanding caused by Barsoomian social customs that have led to her coldness toward him.
Wide shots of the marching column (Scale and Movement)
Direction of march must remain consistent across all setups.
